Name: CartAI
Tagline: The AI agent that handles checkout.
Description: Checkout is the hard part, and most solutions clear it only where the merchant has integrated. CartAI completes checkout on any live merchant surface with no merchant-side work, cooperating with bot detection instead of evading it. One developer-first API, four products: Catalog (search and live pricing across merchants), Checkouts (clear and track orders to confirmation), Payments (PCI off your stack via Visa and Mastercard agent rails), Monetization (commissions on every agent sale).

Name: Lev8
Tagline: Find, research, and reach the right people
Description: Chat with Lev8, the fastest way to find and reach your target people and companies, powered by live web search via parallel AI agents across every corner of the internet. Enrich CSVs with waterfall lookups, monitor intent signals, and send personalized multi-channel messages, all running automatically.

Name: Phantomstory
Tagline: Launch a third-party blog to win AEO with just two clicks
Description: Phantomstory helps teams win AEO by launching third-party blogs on fresh domains in under 5 minutes. With just two clicks, Phantomstory provisions credible content hubs that incrementally publish AI-search-ready articles. The secret? A portion of these expertly-written articles are designed to help LLMs discover, understand, and recommend your company. Stop thinking about AEO as just a monitoring problem; with Phantomstory, transform AEO into an actionable plan that actually drives results.

Name: Rerun
Tagline: The easiest way to build AI agents for all your tasks
Description: Most AI agents are black boxes. Rerun isn't. Build no-code agents that run 24/7, chasing invoices, qualifying leads, clearing your inbox, and watch every step in real time. They pause for approval before anything sensitive. Each workspace gets its own private server. Start with the included model, or connect your own API key or subscription

Name: CreateOS Sandbox
Tagline: Instant, hardware Isolated Sandboxes for AI agents
Topics: SaaS, Developer Tools, Artificial Intelligence, GitHub
Description: CreateOS Sandbox gives AI agent builders their own fast, secure, hardware isolated, sandbox in ~30ms (p90). We have suit of CLI, SDK, 50+ SDK real world examples, claude plugins, computeSDK integration, and more

Name: Bolna Agent Studio
Tagline: Build Voice AI Agent in 10 Minutes
Description: Bolna's Agent Studio lets any business build and deploy a production-grade voice AI agent in minutes, no prompt engineering. Upload a doc or answer a few guided questions, and Studio assembles a call-ready agent from production-tested modules. Sign up and start calling on Day 0.

Name: ditto.site
Tagline: Clone any website into clean code. Free & open source
Topics: Design Tools, Open Source, Developer Tools, GitHub
Description: Point Ditto at any public URL and get a faithful copy as clean, componentized Next.js or Vite code, in minutes. It's fully deterministic, so it's fast, cheap, and consistent. Components, tokens, interactions & hover states included. Free REST API + MCP server, open source.

Name: Jockey by TwelveLabs
Tagline: The video AI agent that understands your whole library
Description: Jockey is the first AI that understands your entire media library just like you do, searching by person, moment, or context across every photo and video you've captured. Powered by TwelveLabs' advanced model stack, Jockey improves automatically with every update. Whether you need to connect via MCP for Claude/ChatGPT or build custom applications using our API, Jockey makes your media library instantly searchable and accessible.

Name: Skim
Tagline: Free, open-source AI email client for Windows
Description: Skim is a free, open-source (MIT) email client for Windows. ✂️ Minimal on purpose: no calendar, no rules engine, no bloat. Fewer buttons, less cognitive load. ⚡ Native Rust core (Tauri 2): ~5 MB installer, sub-second cold start, instant full-text search. 🔒 Local-first, offline-ready, zero telemetry. ✦ AI on your terms: bring your own Anthropic or OpenRouter key and Skim drafts replies in your voice and answers questions across your whole mailbox.

Name: Routine AI
Tagline: Control work with your voice. The Siri for work.
Description: Routine AI lets you control your tasks, calendar, notes and projects using your voice. Just talk naturally to schedule meetings, add reminders, capture ideas, write notes, search your knowledge, update projects and automate repetitive work.

Name: BUD
Tagline: Voice-first canvas for sketchnoting and whiteboarding
Description: Ideate, sketch, and edit diagrams in real time on a voice-first canvas. Speak naturally to build system architectures, flowcharts, and turn ideas into visuals.

Name: OpenChatCut
Tagline: Open-source AI agent video editor with a real timeline
Description: OpenChatCut is an open-source ChatCut alternative: local-first AI video editing where Codex, Claude, and MCP agents work on a real multitrack timeline. Free, editable exports, AGPL.

Name: Topolines
Tagline: Generate Topologic contours
Description: Draw a zone, generate crisp topographic contour lines, and export print-ready SVG & HD PNG. Gradients, elevation taper and Figma-ready output.

Name: tterm
Tagline: A terminal, a real browser, and Claude Code under one roof
Description: tterm is a macOS cockpit for working with Claude Code. Every project is a row of explorer, Claude, and file viewer. Stack as many as you're juggling. A real Chromium browser lives inside, and there's no editor on purpose: you review diffs hunk by hunk and commit. It even rebuilds itself. Ask the Claude pane for a feature and the running app hot-reloads with it. No account, no telemetry. Free for hobbyists, on Apple silicon.

Name: DualStream
Tagline: Simultaneous desktop and mobile streaming, the easy way.
Topics: Video Streaming, User Experience, Streaming Services
Description: Beautifully powerful streaming. Astonishingly easy. DualStream brings Desktop and Mobile audiences your content at the same time, from a single patent-pending engine. DualStream Relay carries your broadcast to every platform from our servers — and if your connection blinks, disconnection protection keeps your stream alive. Native Alerts, Per-Source audio control, VTuber support, instant replay clips, cinema grade effects, pop-out multi-platform chat and so much more is all built in.

Name: Manifest
Tagline: Turn any webpage into an action manifest for AI agents
Description: Manifest turns any webpage into a structured JSON map of what an AI agent can click, fill, and submit. One API call, no fragile selectors. Every action comes with resolved CSS/role locators, plus a requires field that encodes dependencies between elements (e.g. "select a plan before this button is clickable"). That's context aria snapshots don't give you. Python SDK, LangChain support, and an MCP server included. Built for anyone shipping browser agents.

Name: RegionMirror
Tagline: Share a portion of your ultrawide or high-res screen on Mac
Description: Define a region of your screen to be shared from your ultrawide or high resolution monitor, preventing the inevitable "can you zoom in?" that comes with sharing the entire screen. Define any size region to share, move apps in and out of the region seamlessly, resize the region on the fly, set a default region and invoke with a keyboard shortcut for quick and easy sharing. Blur for privacy. Scaled presenter view displays the content your viewers are seeing. Integrated annotations and whiteboard.

Name: Universal Dictation on Stream
Tagline: Private Voice Ring for dictation across iOS & Mac
Description: Introducing Universal Dictation on Stream. Push-to-talk across iOS and Mac: Instantly. No app switching, no reconnection. We built Notes so nothing gets lost, and Chat so you can think out loud. With Dictation, your voice goes anywhere. Notes, Chat, Dictation—in one voice ring

Name: PieceKeeper
Tagline: Track your music repertoire and practice
Description: Never lose track of a piece again. PieceKeeper helps musicians manage their repertoire, run focused practice sessions based on a customized practice schedule, get insights and trends about their practice, and learn music theory through interactive drills and exercises aimed at improving both reading and listening skills.

Name: MeetIsland
Tagline: The Dynamic Island that gets you to meetings on time
Description: MeetIsland turns the MacBook notch into a Dynamic Island for meetings. Your next call lives quietly around the notch and expands with a live countdown and a one-click Join button (Meet/Zoom) right before it starts. Zero setup — it reads calendars already synced to macOS. $6.99 once, 14-day free trial.
